skeleton.name: safe_read_zarr
skeleton.doc: Read an AnnData from a zarr store with best-effort cleanup of helper

skeleton.name: _write_zarr_group_direct
skeleton.doc: Update a single metadata-like AnnData group with one atomic zarr write.

skeleton.name: generate_adata_from_10X
skeleton.doc: Load 10X-formatted data from the session raw_data directory.

skeleton.name: load_selected_dataset
skeleton.doc: Load bundled sample dataset keyed by dropdown value.

skeleton.name: safe_write_zarr
skeleton.doc: Safely write AnnData to a zarr store using atomic replace.

skeleton.name: has_cached_adata
skeleton.doc: Fast O(1) check — returns True if a zarr cache exists for this session.

skeleton.name: cache_adata
skeleton.doc: Read/write AnnData to the session zarr cache.

skeleton.name: prime_correlation_cache
skeleton.doc: Pre-warms the correlation graph cache so the Correlations tab opens instantly.

skeleton.name: prime_adata_cache
skeleton.doc: Pre-warms a template cache for a default dataset.

skeleton.name: custom_plot_multi_gene_trends
skeleton.doc: Plot the gene trends: groups of gene trends in the same panel

skeleton.name: check_csr_data_for_int_floats
skeleton.doc: Checks if the non-zero data elements in a csr_matrix are floats

skeleton.name: initialize_app
skeleton.doc: A single function to run all startup tasks.

skeleton.name: ProgressTracker
skeleton.doc: Tracks task progress and sends email updates via smtplib.

skeleton.name: update_progress
skeleton.params:
(self, task_id: str, user_email: str, 
                       task_name: str, progress: int, 
                       total: int, details: Optional[str] = None)
skeleton.doc: Update task progress and store in Redis.

skeleton.name: get_progress
skeleton.doc: Retrieve progress for a specific task.

skeleton.name: send_progress_email
skeleton.params:
(self, recipient_email: str, task_name: str,
                           progress: int, total: int, 
                           details: Optional[str] = None,
                           task_status: str = 'in_progress')
skeleton.doc: Send progress update email via SMTP.

skeleton.name: send_completion_email
skeleton.params:
(self, recipient_email: str, task_name: str,
                             success: bool = True, 
                             result_details: Optional[str] = None)
skeleton.doc: Send task completion email via SMTP.

skeleton.name: initialize_app
skeleton.doc: A single function to run all startup tasks.

skeleton.name: ProgressTracker
skeleton.doc: Tracks task progress and sends email updates via smtplib.

skeleton.name: update_progress
skeleton.params:
(self, task_id: str, user_email: str, 
                       task_name: str, progress: int, 
                       total: int, details: Optional[str] = None)
skeleton.doc: Update task progress and store in Redis.

skeleton.name: get_progress
skeleton.doc: Retrieve progress for a specific task.

skeleton.name: send_progress_email
skeleton.params:
(self, recipient_email: str, task_name: str,
                           progress: int, total: int, 
                           details: Optional[str] = None,
                           task_status: str = 'in_progress')
skeleton.doc: Send progress update email via SMTP.

skeleton.name: send_completion_email
skeleton.params:
(self, recipient_email: str, task_name: str,
                             success: bool = True, 
                             result_details: Optional[str] = None)
skeleton.doc: Send task completion email via SMTP.

skeleton.name: track_progress
skeleton.doc: Track and store task progress, optionally sending email updates.

skeleton.name: send_progress_notification
skeleton.doc: Send progress update email via SMTP.

skeleton.name: send_task_completion
skeleton.doc: Send task completion notification via SMTP.

skeleton.name: _perf_log
skeleton.doc: Emit a structured [PERF] log line.

skeleton.name: _ts
skeleton.doc: Return current UTC wall-clock timestamp as ISO string.

skeleton.name: compute_correlations_task
skeleton.doc: Compute gene correlations from HVG-selected genes in current session.

skeleton.name: toggle_procssing_accordion
skeleton.params: (n1, n2, n3, n4, is_open1, is_open2, is_open3, is_open4)

skeleton.name: refresh_processing_UMAP
skeleton.params:
(all_btn_clicks, proj_btn_clicks,
                            clust_btn_clicks, processing_plot_type,
                            neighborhood_method, n_dim_proj_plot, 
                            session_ID, pct_cells, pct_counts,
                            n_neighbors, resolution, 
                            min_max_genes, min_cells, n_top_genes,
                            adata=None, target_sum=1e6, 
                            flavor="cell_ranger", n_comps=50, random_state=0)

skeleton.name: _perf_log
skeleton.doc: Emit a structured [PERF] log line.

skeleton.name: preprocess_data
skeleton.params:
(session_ID, adata,
                    min_cells=2, min_genes=200, max_genes=10000,
                    target_sum=1e6, flavor="cell_ranger",
                    n_top_genes=2000)

skeleton.name: load_10x_h5
skeleton.doc: Load a 10x H5 file into an AnnData object.

skeleton.name: process_adata
skeleton.doc: Basic preprocessing: filter cells/genes, copy counts layer, normalize and log1p.

skeleton.name: apply_feature_selection_and_reductions
skeleton.params:
(
    adata,
    mcfano_cutoff: float = 6.0,
    pvalue_cutoff: float = 0.01,
    default_mcFano_threshold: float = 4.0,
    default_pvalue_threshold: float = 0.01,
    cacache: Optional[dict] = None,
)
skeleton.doc: Run mcFano feature selection and compute HV masks and reductions.

skeleton.name: create_graph_from_mcPCCs
skeleton.doc: Create graph from mcPCCs matrix.

skeleton.name: calculate_communities
skeleton.doc: Run walktrap community detection algorithm on the graph, only considering edges greater than edge_cutoff.

skeleton.name: calculate_eigenvector_centrality
skeleton.doc: Calculate eigenvector centrality for each cluster in the graph.

skeleton.name: detect_significant_number_of_negatively_correlated_edges
skeleton.doc: Optimized version: For each pair of clusters, calculate the number of negatively correlated edges and perform a binomial test.

skeleton.name: create_gene_network_subset
skeleton.params: (communities_dict, G, community_0 = 0, community_1 = 1, k_network = 0.1, seed = 0, positive_edge_weight_cutoff = 0.1, negative_edge_weight_cutoff = -0.1, recalculate_position = True)

skeleton.name: draw_network_plot
skeleton.params: (G_subset_edges, community_0, community_1, communities_dict, position, positive_edges_to_plot, negative_edges_to_plot, positive_edge_weight_cutoff, negative_edge_weight_cutoff, network_ax, color_of_comunities, font_size = 6)

skeleton.name: plot_network
skeleton.params: (G, var_with_rank, k_centroids=0.1, k_network=0.1, seed = 0, axes = None, n_top_genes = 100, positive_edge_weight_cutoff = 0.1, negative_edge_weight_cutoff = -0.1, community_0 = 0, community_1 = 0, calculate_spring = True, recalculate_position = True)

skeleton.name: update
skeleton.params: (G, var_with_rank, k_centroids=0.1, k_network=0.1, n_top_genes = 100, positive_edge_weight_cutoff = 0.1, negative_edge_weight_cutoff = -0.1, community_0 = 0, community_1 = 0, calculate_spring = True, recalculate_position = False)

skeleton.name: _generate_hvg_plots
skeleton.doc: Helper function to generate UMAP plots from an AnnData object.

skeleton.name: initial_hvg_load
skeleton.doc: This callback automatically loads the pre-calculated pbmc3k_hvg.h5ad

skeleton.name: recalc_hvgs
skeleton.params: (initial_load_trigger, n_clicks, processing_plot_type, n_dim_proj_plot, umap_select, session_ID, mcfano_cutoff, pvalue_cutoff, hvg_max_points, default_mcfano_cutoff, default_pvalue_cutoff)

skeleton.name: refresh_clustering_plot
skeleton.params:
(active_tab,
                            cluster_btn_clicks, clustering_plot_type,
                            expr_selected, violin_selected,
                            session_ID, clust_selected,
                            adata=None, data_dir=None)

skeleton.name: get_gene_data
skeleton.doc: A function used to get gene:

skeleton.name: _ensure_umap
skeleton.doc: Regenerate UMAP embeddings if missing by rerunning PCA → neighbors → UMAP.

skeleton.name: create_centroid_plot_data
skeleton.doc: Create Plotly traces for centroid graph visualization.

skeleton.name: _edges_to_trace
skeleton.doc: Batch all edges into a single trace using None separators.

skeleton.name: create_edge_traces
skeleton.doc: Create a single batched edge trace for Plotly using None separators.

skeleton.name: create_network_plot_data
skeleton.params:
(
    G_subset_edges,
    position,
    positive_edges_to_plot,
    negative_edges_to_plot,
    communities_dict,
    color_mapping,
    community_0,
    community_1
)
skeleton.doc: Create Plotly traces for gene network visualization.

skeleton.name: plot_correlation_network
skeleton.params:
(
    G,
    var_with_rank,
    communities_dict,
    k_centroids=0.1,
    k_network=0.1,
    seed=0,
    n_top_genes=100,
    positive_edge_weight_cutoff=0.1,
    negative_edge_weight_cutoff=-0.1,
    community_0=0,
    community_1=0,
    calculate_spring=True,
    recalculate_position=True
)
skeleton.doc: Create both centroid and gene network plots as Plotly figures.

skeleton.doc: Emit a structured [PERF] log line.

skeleton.doc: Create dictionary of communities with top N genes by centrality.

skeleton.params:
(
    communities_dict,

    negative_edge_weight_cutoff=-0.1,
    recalculate_position=True
)
